SUSTAINABILITY Our World FAQS COCKTAILS OCHO OLD FASHIONED RARE DARK RUM BACARDÍ RESERVA OCHO Inspired by a family recipe from 1862, BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho is known as The Family Reserve. VIDEO HOW TO MAKE A OCHO OLD FASHIONED BETTER WITH AGE Tasting Notes BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho is a complex golden rum with a deep, layered and mellow flavor of dried fruits, spices and oaky vanilla. Nose Dried apricot and banana leaf Palate Oak and spices Finish Expansive and well-rounded After a minimum of eight years of ageing, BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho releases delightful flavors of stone fruits and spices. OUR RECOMMENDED RUMS LIKE THIS? TRY THESE If you enjoy this rum, here’s our recommendations of other BACARDĺ rums we think you’ll like VIEW OUR RUMS BACARDÍ CARTA ORO BACARDÍ SPICED BACARDÍ AÑEJO CUATRO BACARDÍ RESERVA DIEZ BACARDÍ Reserva Limitada VIEW OUR RUMS EXPLORE THE ANGEL'S SHARE Under the warmth of the Caribbean sun, some golden liquid vanishes to the heavens. Michael B. Jordan’s cinematic film explores the angels’ love of BACARDÍ. DISCOVER MORE BACARDÍ Cocktails GET CREATIVE Engage your imagination to create cocktails with BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho, from modern classics to familiar favorites. VIEW ALL COCKTAILS Ocho Old Fashioned Ocho on the Rocks Old Cuban Hotel Nacional Rum Negroni Drag to discover more VIEW ALL COCKTAILS MERCHANDISE GET KITTED OUT Glasses. Squeezers. Cocktail kits. Discover everything you need to create standout BACARDÍ cocktails. SHOP NOW FAQ CURIOUS ABOUT RUM? WHAT IS AGED RUM? Rum can be aged anywhere from one year upwards. Aging rum can add additional complexity to its flavor and mouthfeel. WHAT IS THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN DARK, GOLD AND WHITE RUM? Rum is a wonderfully complex and diverse spirit. Color can give us clues about time spent aging or the flavors that might be found within. Dark can be bold, sweet (or dry) and even smoky, gold is rich and soothing, and white is smooth, subtle and often refreshing. But color can be misleading. The best way to truly understand a rum is to taste it for yourself. HOW DO YOU MAKE RUM? Rum is made using only three ingredients: molasses from sugarcane, yeast and water. Ingredients are fermented, then distilled, aged, filtered and blended. metadata.description: After a minimum of eight years of waiting, BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho releases delightful flavors of stone fruits and spices. Enjoy this golden sipping rum and discover a private rum for all to enjoy
